summary: Iteration 6 backend smoke-tests complete for Kiosk / Ads-Management endpoints + backwards-compat sanity checks. Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_kiosk_ads_iter6.py (31 tests across 5 classes covering every bullet in the review request). All 31 iter6 tests PASS against the public preview URL (https://denfert-pizzeria.preview.emergentagent.com). Full regression run of /app/backend/tests/ shows 120/124 passing — the 4 failures are pre-existing and out-of-scope: they live in test_reservations_zones_iter5.py and indicate that zone-seat capacity is no longer enforced (30-seat indoor cap, 20-seat terrace cap). Likely caused by the tables-based capacity model (DEFAULT_TABLES = 8 indoor / 5 terrace tables of 4 seats) introduced after iter5. Flagged for main agent — see action_items.

minor.issue: Iter5 regression: zone seat-capacity (indoor=30, terrace=20) is no longer rejecting over-cap bookings with 409. Posting a 31st seat into indoor (or 21st into terrace) returns 200 instead of 409, and GET /api/reservations/availability returns full=false even when booked==capacity. Reproducible in isolation via `pytest backend/tests/test_reservations_zones_iter5.py`. Likely root cause: the tables-based cap (DEFAULT_TABLES.tables_indoor=8 of seats_per_table=4 = 32 → table 0 picked, but `_ensure_can_book` may now short-circuit on tables_available before checking seat caps). Out-of-scope for the iter6 kiosk/ads review but flagging because the prompt asks for reservations regression sanity.

per_class.TestAdminSlidesCRUD: 4/4 (list, full CRUD, 404 on delete-missing, 400 on bad section)
per_class.TestAdminKioskSettings: 3/3 (GET shape, PUT idle_seconds=45 → re-GET → restore 30, out-of-range rejection)
per_class.TestBackwardsCompat: 3/3 (POST /auth/login admin, GET /menu non-empty, GET /reservations/me with admin Bearer)

feature_verification.DELETE_/admin/ads/slides/{id}_removes_an: VERIFIED (admin list AND public list both no longer return id)

action_items: Investigate the 4 iter5 zone-capacity regressions: seat-cap (30 indoor / 20 terrace) is no longer enforced — booking a 31st seat returns 200 instead of 409, and availability.full stays false. Likely tables-based capacity (DEFAULT_TABLES) introduced after iter5 is now the only check. See /app/backend/server.py around _ensure_can_book / _zone_booked. Out-of-scope for the iter6 ads work itself but the review request explicitly asked for reservation regression sanity.

Optional cleanup: DEFAULT_SLIDES seeder hardcodes duration_ms=5000 for every slide (line ~1496) ignoring the slide.duration_ms-per-record concept — fine, but worth noting that admins editing a single slide's duration is honoured (verified).
critical_code_review_comments: All /api/admin/ads/* and /api/admin/ads/settings handlers consistently call _require_admin(authorization) before any DB work — correct ordering and uniform across all six endpoints.
Public /api/ads/slides correctly filters to active==True via the Mongo query and re-sorts by canonical section rank (loyalty → experience → ingredients) on top of the DB sort. Belt-and-braces.
_serialise_slide() strips _id and ISO-formats datetimes — no MongoDB ObjectID leakage on any of the 7 ads endpoints (verified by JSON-decoding every response without errors).
_seed_default_slides_if_empty() is idempotent (`count_documents == 0` guard). Confirmed: re-hitting GET /ads/slides after the first call does not duplicate the 14 default rows.

Validation on duration_ms (500..60000) is enforced on BOTH POST and PATCH paths, and idle_seconds (5..600) + default_duration_ms (500..60000) on PUT /admin/ads/settings — verified with negative tests.
DEFAULT_SLIDES seeder ignores `s.get('image_url')` because none of the 14 defaults define one — they all get image_url='' which is fine for text-only kiosk cards.

success_rate.backend: 100% on iter6 in-scope (31/31); 96.8% on full regression (120/124, with 4 pre-existing out-of-scope iter5 failures)
success_rate.frontend: N/A — skipped per review request (backend only)

seed_data_creation: Tests create exactly one transient TEST_SMOKE slide that is created → patched → deleted within the same test (always cleaned up via try/finally). Kiosk settings are snapshotted at module setup and restored at teardown via an autouse fixture. The default 14-slide seed (already present in this environment from prior runs) is left untouched. No menu / reservations / user data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter6 kiosk/ads tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_kiosk_ads_iter6.py and run cleanly in isolation: `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_kiosk_ads_iter6.py -v`. Auth gating tests use parametrized fixtures with three bad-auth flavours (no header / garbage bearer / Basic scheme) — extend the BAD_HEADERS list if you add more admin endpoints. The module-scoped restore_kiosk_settings fixture snapshots and restores the kiosk settings dict so feel free to add tests that mutate idle_seconds/loop/etc. The 4 pre-existing iter5 zone-capacity failures need separate attention (see action_items) — DO NOT muddy iter6 by trying to fix them in this iteration's report.
rca_of_issue:
iter6 itself: no defects — every kiosk/ads endpoint behaves as specified.

Pre-existing iter5 regression (flagged, NOT fixed here):
- Symptom: Booking a 31st guest into indoor (or 21st into terrace) returns 200 instead of 409 at /api/reservations. availability.full stays false even when booked==capacity.
- Reproduction: `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_reservations_zones_iter5.py -v` → 4 failures.
- Probable cause: a table-based capacity model (DEFAULT_TABLES.tables_indoor=8, tables_terrace=5, seats_per_table=4 → 32 indoor / 20 terrace TABLE capacity) was introduced after iter5 and now drives _ensure_can_book / _zone_booked. The seat-based cap stored at app_settings.capacity (indoor=30 / terrace=20) appears to no longer be the binding constraint. Inspect _ensure_can_book + _zone_booked + the availability handler in /app/backend/server.py.
- Mitigation: either (a) ensure availability/seat-cap is enforced in parallel with table-cap, or (b) update iter5 tests to reflect the new table-based model. Main agent decision.
